page_metadata.biotools__summary: R package for the study of prokaryotic pan-genomes. A pan-genome is defined as the set of all unique gene families found in one or more strains of a prokaryotic species.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: R package for the study of prokaryotic pan-genomes. A pan-genome is defined as the set of all unique gene families found in one or more strains of a prokaryotic species.
